moments.title: Paul McCartney's 84th Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles and Wings co-frontman, Sir Paul McCartney, celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Iconic Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 84th birthday to a true music icon, Sir Paul McCartney! What's your all-time favourite Beatles, Wings or solo track?

angles.name: Still a Legend
angles.copy: From Liverpool legend to global superstar, Paul McCartney turns 84 today. Still touring, still writing hits. An incredible legacy.

moments.title: Scotland vs Morocco in World Cup
moments.blurb: Scotland's national men's team faces Morocco in their next FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage match tomorrow, Friday June 19th, at 11 PM UK time.

angles.name: Tartan Army Ready
angles.copy: The Tartan Army is geared up! Scotland takes on Morocco in the World Cup group stage tomorrow night. What's your score prediction?

angles.name: Big Game Buzz
angles.copy: Tomorrow night, it's Scotland's next big World Cup match against Morocco! Let's hear your messages of support for the team!

moments.title: Summer Solstice - Longest Day
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year and the official start of astronomical summer in the UK, is this Friday, June 20th, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for the longest day! The Summer Solstice is this Friday. How are you planning to make the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Summer Arrives
angles.copy: Summer officially arrives this Friday with the Solstice! What's at the top of your perfect summer playlist right now?

moments.title: Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'All Night Long' and 'Hello', turns 77 this Friday, June 20th.

angles.name: Hello Lionel!
angles.copy: Hello! Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday this Friday. What's your favourite smooth classic from the icon?

angles.name: All Night Long
angles.copy: All night long! Happy 77th birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie this Friday. An absolute legend across decades.

moments.title: Lana Del Rey's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: Critically acclaimed artist Lana Del Rey, known for her distinctive style and melancholic sound, turns 41 this Saturday, June 21st.

angles.name: Iconic Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 41st birthday to the iconic Lana Del Rey this Saturday! Which of her tracks is your absolute favourite?

angles.name: Best Track
angles.copy: From 'Video Games' to 'Summertime Sadness', Lana Del Rey turns 41 on Saturday. What do you think is her best track?

moments.title: Chris Pratt's 47th Birthday
moments.blurb: Hollywood actor Chris Pratt, star of 'Guardians of the Galaxy' and 'Jurassic World', turns 47 this Saturday, June 21st.

angles.name: Movie Star Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 47th birthday to the brilliant Chris Pratt this Saturday! What's your favourite movie role of his?

angles.name: From Star-Lord
angles.copy: From Star-Lord to Owen Grady, Chris Pratt turns 47 on Saturday. What's your go-to Chris Pratt movie?

moments.title: New Official UK Singles Chart Out Tomorrow
moments.blurb: The brand new Official UK Singles Chart Top 40 will be revealed tomorrow, Friday, June 20th, bringing new music and potential chart-toppers.

angles.name: Chart Anticipation
angles.copy: It's New Music Friday tomorrow and a brand new Official UK Singles Chart! Who do you think will be number one?

angles.name: Top Spot Predictions
angles.copy: Anticipation builds for tomorrow's new UK Singles Chart! Any predictions for the top spot? Let us know!

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The trailblazing 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' singer Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday this Monday, June 22nd.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna
angles.copy: Girls (and boys!) just want to wish Cyndi Lauper a happy 73rd birthday this Monday! What's your favourite 80s anthem from her?

angles.name: True Colors Icon
angles.copy: True Colors shining through! Cyndi Lauper turns 73 on Monday. A pop icon then and now, still inspiring.

moments.title: England vs Australia in World Cup
moments.blurb: England faces Australia in their next FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage match this Monday, June 22nd, at 8 PM BST.

angles.name: Big Game Monday
angles.copy: It's England vs Australia in the World Cup on Monday! Where are you watching the big game?

angles.name: Three Lions Focus
angles.copy: Three Lions on the shirt, three points on the mind. Can England secure another crucial win against Australia this Monday?

moments.title: Scotland vs Brazil in World Cup
moments.blurb: Scotland's national men's team faces five-time world champions Brazil in their final FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage match next Wednesday, June 24th, at 11 PM UK time.

angles.name: Huge Challenge
angles.copy: A massive test for Scotland next Wednesday as they take on Brazil in the World Cup! What's your prediction for this huge match?

angles.name: Tartan Army Roar
angles.copy: Scotland vs Brazil next Wednesday! The Tartan Army will be roaring them on for their final group game. C'mon Scotland!

moments.title: Glastonbury Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The world-famous Glastonbury Festival kicks off next week, running from Wednesday, June 24th to Sunday, June 28th at Worthy Farm.

angles.name: Worthy Farm Calling
angles.copy: The countdown to Worthy Farm is officially on! Glastonbury Festival starts next week. Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Fever
angles.copy: Glastonbury Festival kicks off next week! Who's heading down to soak up the atmosphere and incredible music?

moments.title: Sam Fender's 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: North Shields' own Brit Award-winning artist Sam Fender, known for his anthemic rock, turns 33 this Wednesday, June 25th.

angles.name: Geordie Legend
angles.copy: Happy 33rd birthday to our very own Geordie legend, Sam Fender, this Wednesday! What's your go-to Sam Fender track?

angles.name: Anthem King
angles.copy: From North Shields to the main stage, Sam Fender turns 33 on Wednesday! Which of his anthems gets you every time?

moments.title: Ariana Grande's 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, celebrates her 33rd birthday this Thursday, June 26th.

angles.name: Pop Queen Birthday
angles.copy: Thank U, Next! Ariana Grande turns 33 this Thursday. What's your favourite track from the pop queen?

angles.name: Hit Machine
angles.copy: Happy 33rd birthday to the one and only Ariana Grande this Thursday! Which of her hits always gets you dancing?

moments.title: House of the Dragon Season 2 Ongoing
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated second season of HBO's 'House of the Dragon' is now airing weekly, continuing the saga of the Targaryen civil war, having premiered on June 16th.

angles.name: Team Rhaenyra or Alicent
angles.copy: House of the Dragon Season 2 is well underway and heating up! Are you Team Rhaenyra or Team Alicent?

angles.name: Fire and Blood
angles.copy: Fire and Blood! House of the Dragon Season 2 is gripping. What are your predictions for the next episode?

moments.title: Morvala Festival in Cornwall
moments.blurb: The Morvala Music Festival, a new eclectic festival experience in Cornwall featuring a diverse lineup of artists, runs from June 25th to 28th.

angles.name: Cornwall Calling
angles.copy: Exciting news for Cornwall! The Morvala Music Festival kicks off on June 25th with a wildly eclectic lineup. Who are you hoping to see?

angles.name: New Festival Vibes
angles.copy: A new festival experience is coming to Cornwall next week! Morvala Festival promises great music and entertainment. Who's in?

moments.title: Hampton Court Palace Festival
moments.blurb: The Hampton Court Palace Festival continues this week with a series of sensational concerts set against the historic backdrop, featuring artists like Elvis Costello & The Imposters tonight.

angles.name: Palace Gigs
angles.copy: Tonight at Hampton Court Palace Festival, it's Elvis Costello & The Imposters! Who's heading to this iconic setting for some live music?

angles.name: Historic Concerts
angles.copy: The Hampton Court Palace Festival continues this week with an amazing lineup against a stunning backdrop. What's your dream concert venue?
